name: Seafoam Swordsong
description:
A special drink that balances icy-cool freshness with the satisfying kick of a proper tipple. This is a masterpiece that was crafted for Eula with "Twinkling Starlight" serving as the creative inspiration when The Honorary Knight's Cocktail Shack was in operation.
Her swordsmanship, like the dance of a claymore, strikes with the force of an avalanche yet finishes cleanly and elegantly, and her preference in drinks is just as bold.
To match her style, the drink brings together ice-pure Fire-Water, commemorative Romaritime Flower fruit juice, and cocoa to restore energy and banish fatigue, creating a true dance of flavors in the cup.
As this is a drink that was specially crafted in honor of the Spindrift Knight's swordsmanship, you decided to name it "Seafoam Swordsong." Eula's approval of the name is clear from the three glasses of the drink she then imbibed after...
